Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and accurate product info, eliminating manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling daily marketing email using scraped R1 product data, including subject line, body copy, and CTA.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email content in seconds, replacing hours of manual copywriting each day.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated email to segmented R1 contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers daily personalized marketing at scale with full tracking, ensuring consistent customer touchpoints without manual sends.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, friction compound details, and current promotions for email content sourcing.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Grounds every email in accurate, up-to-date DFC product information without requiring manual input from the marketing team.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily DFC-branded marketing email with subject line, body copy, and product-focused CTAs based on scraped content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily email creation for a separate brand, doubling output without adding headcount or copywriting time.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Distributes the AI-generated DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Maintains consistent daily communication with DFC customers and prospects, driving repeat engagement and sales opportunities.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls open support tickets from HubSpot, extracting customer issue details, ticket history, and contact information.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for automated processing, ensuring no ticket is missed or delayed.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a context-aware reply for the R1 support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces ticket triage and response drafting time significantly, allowing support agents to handle higher volume with less effort.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review and action.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket activity inside HubSpot, giving agents one place to review, edit, and send responses without switching tools.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions stored in HubSpot, including customer details and issue descriptions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all return and issue data from one source automatically, eliminating manual export and copy-paste workflows.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, organized view of product issues and return patterns, enabling faster quality and ops decisions.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent buying signals in real time, giving the sales team the ability to act while interest is at its peak.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email with the customer's activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Ensures sales reps receive timely, actionable intelligence without manually monitoring CRM activity, accelerating outreach response time.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Planned customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts — specific functionality and integrations are not yet defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer interactions and self-service support, reducing inbound volume to the human support team.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh pipeline of qualified sublet prospects daily without any manual prospecting effort from the team.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates email addresses for decision-makers at the identified local businesses.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach reaches the right person directly, improving reply rates and reducing bounce rates on cold emails.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs discovered leads into HubSpot and sends personalized warm intro emails about the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates an entire daily outbound lead-gen and outreach cycle, turning an empty building into an active deal pipeline hands-free.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls live campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts, including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes cross-brand ad performance data automatically, replacing manual report downloads from Amazon's advertising console.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget shifts, and keyword actions.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers expert-level ad analysis at scale across two brands simultaneously, improving ROAS and reducing wasted ad spend.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, pulling channel metadata, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Surfaces relevant YouTube creators instantly across any niche, replacing hours of manual channel research and vetting.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers and retrieves Instagram creator profiles related to the same keywords, including follower counts and engagement data.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across platforms in one workflow, building a cross-channel list without separate manual searches.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes all discovered creator profiles using AI to assess relevance, audience fit, and content quality against the target criteria.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large raw list down to high-potential creator matches, saving significant manual review time and improving targeting precision.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria such as engagement rate, audience demographics, niche relevance, and follower size.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective shortlist of creators instantly, enabling faster and more confident partnership decisions.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves pre-approved outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach message is grounded in vetted brand guidelines and targeting criteria, eliminating manual file hunting.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by combining their profile data with learned sequence prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand pitches at scale without copywriter time, increasing reply rates through relevant personalization.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand email account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator prospecting, allowing teams to contact hundreds of creators simultaneously with zero manual sending.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email threads and negotiation outcomes to train context for the AI response model.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real past conversations, ensuring negotiation tone and deal terms align with what has worked before.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator reply emails and surfaces thread context to the AI for response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Captures every inbound creator message in real time so no reply goes unnoticed or delayed, protecting relationship momentum.

Creator Reponse.action: Generates a contextually appropriate negotiation reply using the creator's message, historical deal data, and learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Accelerates deal closure by delivering prompt, intelligent responses that reflect brand negotiation standards without requiring a human intermediary.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual spreadsheet matching every week, producing an accurate load sheet in seconds with no lookup errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates a new HubSpot email draft and attaches the generated sales sheet and load sheet for the weekly Must Have Monday campaign.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Delivers a fully assembled, send-ready campaign email into HubSpot automatically, removing manual email build time each Monday.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a completion notification to the designated Teams channel confirming the email draft and load sheet are ready for review.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Gives the marketing team instant visibility that the weekly automation ran successfully, enabling fast final approval without status check-ins.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy and monthly recap email content based on new product data and DFC brand voice guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand launch and recap emails instantly, cutting copywriting time from hours to seconds per campaign.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot for each First to Market product launch and monthly recap, attaching relevant sales sheets.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers fully structured, send-ready HubSpot campaigns for every new product without manual email building, accelerating launch speed.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Aggregates CRM performance data automatically, replacing manual HubSpot report exports that previously took significant analyst time.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance data including send volume, CTR, and revenue driven for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Captures SMS channel results automatically so no manual data pull is needed from the Attentive dashboard each reporting cycle.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, conversion, and session data alongside Search Console keyword and impression metrics for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates digital performance data from two sources in one step, ensuring slides reflect accurate traffic and SEO health without manual exports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck with all retrieved metrics, charts, and data labels automatically.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated, presentation-ready deck section every month without any manual slide editing, saving hours of formatting work.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms versus competitors by analyzing impression and ranking data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Surfaces the highest-opportunity SEO targets automatically, ensuring content production focuses on gaps that drive real organic traffic gains.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured, SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps using R1 Concepts product and brand context.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready, search-optimized content at scale, dramatically reducing the time and cost of manual SEO content creation.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog post to WordPress with Yoast SEO fields populated including meta title, description, and focus keyword.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates manual CMS publishing and SEO field entry, getting optimized content live faster and ensuring no Yoast fields are missed.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor details, order status, due dates, and outstanding quantities.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures the full vendor PO picture from the source system automatically, eliminating manual export and data preparation steps.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates vendor follow-up outreach end-to-end, ensuring every overdue PO triggers a timely chase email without manual intervention.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle part number data and New Availability Guide file directly in the browser without any server connection.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Enables any team member to generate load sheets instantly from their browser with no software installation, logins, or IT dependency.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide and exports a formatted DFC load sheet as a downloadable Excel file.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Produces a clean, formatted load sheet in seconds that previously required manual cross-referencing, removing errors and saving prep time.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive in Chrome, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the starting point for the new weekly campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Removes the need for any manual campaign setup in Attentive each week, preserving consistent formatting and segment targeting from the previous send.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's featured vehicle name and adjusts the scheduled send time, then saves the campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Delivers a fully configured, ready-to-send weekly SMS campaign without any human touching the Attentive interface, saving setup time every Monday.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product lines, and revenue figures.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides the complete sales dataset needed for segmentation and analysis, replacing manual report pulls from the ERP system.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back buckets and enrolls each segment into the appropriate automated email campaign.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Triggers targeted, timely outreach to the right customers automatically, driving repeat purchases and recovering lapsed accounts without manual campaign setup.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends SMS campaign messages to high-priority segments such as win-back and reorder audiences identified from the sales analysis.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds an SMS touchpoint to customer outreach sequences, increasing response rates and revenue recovery beyond email alone.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking by automatically detecting when the new session file is ready, ensuring the email process kicks off instantly without human intervention.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a shareable download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures subscribers always receive a live, accurate download link without anyone manually uploading assets or updating URLs in the email template.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps the download link with the new file URL, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated weekly email to the entire list on a consistent schedule with zero manual email-building, saving 30–60 minutes of repetitive work each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured, SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences including shops, distributors, and fleets based on keyword and topic inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog drafts in minutes instead of hours, enabling DFC to maintain a consistent content calendar that drives organic search traffic without hiring additional writers.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes or stages it with proper formatting, categories, tags, and SEO metadata applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Gets optimized content live on the DFC website rapidly, building domain authority and indexable pages that compound in search rankings over time.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and fetches specs and history from Wikipedia for the given year/make/model.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset gathering by automatically assembling all raw content inputs before a single word is written.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Uses the scraped vehicle data and Wikipedia content to generate a complete, formatted Friction Friday video script with intro, talking points, and outro.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready script in seconds, maintaining consistent show tone and structure without any manual writing.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a designated AI voice profile.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers a polished, consistent voiceover track instantly, removing the need for recording sessions or audio editing.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Via Apps Script webhook, logs the completed package metadata — script, audio file link, thumbnail asset, and video status — into a tracking spreadsheet for review and publishing.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Creates a centralized production log so every video asset is organized, trackable, and ready for final upload without hunting through folders or inboxes.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all active HubSpot workflows for R1 Concepts and audits enrollment triggers, delay logic, and email sequences for the site visit and welcome series flows.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies broken triggers, redundant steps, or poorly timed sequences that are causing lead drop-off, enabling targeted fixes that improve conversion rates in the welcome and nurture funnel.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies recommended changes to workflow triggers, timing, and branching logic based on audit findings and pushes the updated configurations live.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Delivers a cleaner, higher-performing automation stack that reduces wasted contacts, improves welcome email open rates, and ensures site-visit triggers fire accurately for every qualifying lead.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports customer records from Dream ERP including CustomerIDs, contact details, and account attributes needed for matching to HubSpot profiles.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Provides the foundational data link between DFC's transactional system and its marketing platform, making it possible to trigger sales automations based on real purchase and account history.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps each Dream CustomerID to the corresponding HubSpot contact record by matching on email or name and writes the CustomerID as a custom contact property.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Unlocks the ability to trigger HubSpot sales workflows based on ERP data such as order status, spend thresholds, or account tier, creating a fully connected sales automation engine for DFC.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.
Bomb File Project.impact: Establishing scope and tooling early ensures the final automation is built on the right stack and delivers measurable business value from day one.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects the latest R1 Concepts YouTube video upload and extracts the video URL, title, description, and transcript for use across all channels.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends an SMS to the R1 subscriber list with a short teaser and direct link to the new video or blog post.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Posts a completion summary to the R1 Teams channel confirming that the blog post, email, and SMS were all successfully deployed for the week.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Provides the R1 team with instant, centralized confirmation of campaign execution so they can monitor performance or flag issues without logging into each individual platform.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword ranking data, impressions, clicks, and average position for all DFC blog URLs to track SEO performance.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives the DFC team clear visibility into which blog topics and keywords are gaining traction in search, enabling smarter content prioritization each week.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves blog traffic metrics including sessions, new users, time on page, and conversion events attributed to organic blog content.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects SEO performance directly to business outcomes, showing how blog traffic translates into engagement and lead activity for DFC.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls post-level metadata including publish dates, word counts, and post count for the reporting period to measure content output efficiency.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Quantifies the productivity of the blog agent, demonstrating volume and consistency of content production relative to traffic and ranking gains.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Extracts SEO scores, readability scores, and focus keyword data for each published post to assess content optimization quality.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Ensures the reporting dashboard captures content quality signals alongside traffic data, allowing the team to correlate optimization scores with ranking improvements over time.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking trends, impressions, clicks, and position data for all R1 Concepts blog content to measure organic search growth.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides R1 stakeholders with a clear monthly view of SEO momentum, making it easy to demonstrate the ROI of the blog agent and guide future content strategy.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly blog traffic data including organic sessions, new users, engagement rate, and goal completions tied to blog content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Documents content output volume and consistency, allowing the R1 team to verify the agent is delivering on its production targets and identify any gaps in topic coverage.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice emails and extracts the attached PDF files for processing.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Stamps and signs vendor invoices in seconds rather than minutes per document, dramatically reducing manual handling time and eliminating the risk of missing or inconsistent signatures.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Saves the finalized stamped and signed PDF as a new file with a standardized naming convention ready for delivery or archiving.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Produces a clean, professional, court-ready signed document every time with consistent formatting, reducing errors and ensuring vendor compliance without any manual PDF editing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and passes behavioral signals to HubSpot.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Identifies high-intent prospects by page visit patterns, enabling timely and relevant follow-up without manual monitoring.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support tickets and queues them for AI classification and response.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type, determines urgency, and drafts an appropriate response or resolution path.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Reduces average ticket handle time and ensures consistent, accurate responses across all support volume.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Speeds up resolution for routine tickets while ensuring complex issues reach the right team member immediately.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and initiates the upload workflow to the DFC backend.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual handoff steps and ensures the new parts data enters the pipeline immediately upon file delivery.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Uploads and processes the new arrivals file so product data is live and ready to be referenced in outbound communications.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrivals data, and schedules the monthly send.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers into an outreach sequence and automatically sends RFQ emails.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data from all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Pulls full-month performance data across all paid channels for the reporting period.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Sends the completed monthly report to the appropriate stakeholders for review and use in monthly slide decks.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Identifies contacts who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration and segments them into a sync-ready audience list.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad copy and associated performance metrics from Meta and TikTok ad accounts.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, due date changes, status shifts, or newly created tasks across tracked projects.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting as it concludes.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Forwards the meeting transcript or summary to Claude for processing and task extraction.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a reliable handoff point between the meeting capture and the AI processing step, maintaining a clear audit trail.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Parses the meeting content to extract discrete tasks, assign owners, and determine due dates based on context.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data and current ad copy for all active search ads, filtering for underperforming ads based on CTR, conversion rate, or Quality Score thresholds.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Analyzes the underperforming ad copy against performance metrics and generates specific, actionable rewrite recommendations with reasoning for each suggested change.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent entries, statuses, owners, and recent activity logged for the week.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Transforms the raw sheet data into a clean, human-readable weekly update summary, grouping agents by status and highlighting key progress or blockers.

Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Keeps stakeholders consistently informed without anyone spending time writing or distributing the update manually.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec (make, model, year, and relevant attributes) via a HubSpot form, which triggers a lookup against the DFC parts catalog for matching inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly initiates a catalog query from a simple form submission, removing the need for Mark to manually search the catalog or ask someone internally.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP system to confirm live stock levels for all catalog matches, identifying what DFC currently has available versus what is absent from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Grounds the output in real-time inventory data, ensuring Mark receives accurate stock availability rather than outdated catalog assumptions.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the catalog match and inventory data into a clean, structured Excel-ready layout, labeling what DFC stocks and clearly flagging what is missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a professional, decision-ready output file without any manual formatting — saving significant prep time before customer or sales conversations.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark with a summary of what was found for the submitted vehicle spec.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to Mark's inbox automatically, closing the loop on the request without any manual handoff or file sharing.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing weekly backorder report spreadsheet with the live Dream inventory data, appending status columns and flagging parts with no available source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a live, actionable report that instantly shows which parts are resolvable and which are dead ends — eliminating guesswork.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder lines, pre-populated with the relevant part status and estimated resolution context.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time to communicate backorder updates to customers from hours of manual drafting to near-instant delivery of consistent, accurate messages.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitment data by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Captures comprehensive competitor catalog coverage automatically, replacing what would otherwise be days of manual catalog browsing across three separate platforms.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify coverage overlaps and gaps in DFC's current lineup.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Immediately reveals where DFC is competitive and where product gaps exist — giving Dino a strategic view of expansion opportunities without manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers to gather demand data for fitments where DFC currently has no two-piece rotor coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Proactively collects real demand signals from the market, allowing DFC to prioritize product development based on actual customer interest rather than assumptions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and incoming demand responses into one formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, organized source of truth for two-piece rotor market coverage — ready to inform sourcing, product, and sales decisions immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — for the specified target phrases.
Meta Investigation.impact: Audits the entire active ad library in one pass, catching every instance of flagged language across all campaigns instantly rather than through manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Processes the scanned ad copy to identify and extract every exact match of the target phrases, noting the specific field and full copy context for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Produces a precise, structured list of flagged matches with full context — eliminating ambiguity about where problematic language appears and in what form.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report of all flagged ad instances, showing the exact phrase match, the field it was found in, and the surrounding copy for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a clear, actionable compliance or review report directly to the requester's inbox — enabling fast decisions without anyone needing to log into ad platforms.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 55 total agents across the board — 27 completed, 11 in progress, and 17 planned. There were no new agents added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, so the roster remains steady from last week. The completed fleet continues running reliably in the background, handling everything from daily email marketing and influencer outreach to paid channel audits and weekly reporting. With 17 planned agents still in the queue, there's plenty of momentum ahead — stay tuned for updates as in-progress builds push toward completion!
